title: Nutrition risk review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.
investigations.rationale: The exact section supports interval weight loss, poor appetite, reduced intake, altered taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI and functional impact when assessed without calculating risk.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.6 — screening, clinical concern, weight loss, intake, and swallowing

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician-recorded malnutrition or risk criteria and consent or best-interest discussion; no diagnosis, calculation, feeding route, or treatment is generated.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact section supports recording clinician-reviewed criteria, consent or best-interest context, and an entered plan without generating nutrition support.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-recorded malnutrition or risk criteria and consent or best-interest discussion; no diagnosis, calculation, feeding route, or treatment is generated.

source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations

sources_used.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation

source_limitations: Measured weight, BMI, percentage loss, intake duration, swallowing safety, diagnosis, consent, treatment, dietetics, and monitoring remain unsupported unless entered.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
